title: High CPU Usage on prod-web-server-01
description: CPU usage has exceeded 95% for the last 10 minutes on production web server. Multiple processes consuming excessive resources. Application response times degrading.
root_cause: Runaway telemetry agent telemetry-daemon (PID: 28456) consuming excessive CPU cycles due to connection timeout loop.
resolution: Identify top process, kill runaway process telemetry-daemon (PID: 28456), and restart telemetry agent with CPU limits.

title: Disk Space Critical on db-server-03
description: Disk space on /data partition has reached 94%. Database logs are growing rapidly. Risk of database crash if disk fills completely.
root_cause: Uncompressed archived logs accumulating in /var/log/db/archive without proper log rotation configuration.
resolution: Check disk space, compress archived files older than 3 days, delete stale temporary files in /tmp, and enable automatic log rotation.

title: Memory Leak Detected in payment-service
description: Memory consumption of payment-service has been steadily increasing. Current usage at 87% of allocated memory. Garbage collection unable to reclaim memory.
root_cause: Memory leak in node-based payment-service container. Connections are kept open indefinitely, exhausting heap size.
resolution: Capture heap dump, trigger garbage collection, and gracefully restart service order-service-container to restore normal memory bounds.

title: Database Connection Pool Exhausted
description: All 200 database connections in the pool are in use. New requests are being queued. Average wait time has increased to 15 seconds.
root_cause: Active connection leak in user checkout API route. Connections are not returned to the pool after query completion.
resolution: Identify and kill idle database connections, increase pool size to 250, and restart connection pool service.

title: SSL Certificate Expiring in 7 Days
description: SSL certificate for api.example.com will expire on 2026-06-18. Automated renewal has not triggered. Manual intervention may be required.
root_cause: Automated cert-manager API secret renewal failed due to DNS validation challenge error.
resolution: Renew SSL certificate manually using certbot, update DNS challenge configuration, and reload proxy service.

title: Multiple Failed SSH Login Attempts
description: Detected 847 failed SSH login attempts from IP 203.0.113.42 in the last hour. Possible brute force attack targeting production bastion host.
root_cause: Automated brute force dictionary attack from IP 203.0.113.42 targeting standard SSH port 22.
resolution: Add offending IP address 203.0.113.42 to firewall / iptables drop rules and restrict bastion access to VPN gateway IP.

title: API Response Time Degradation
description: Average API response time has increased from 120ms to 2.3s over the last 30 minutes. Affecting /api/v2/orders and /api/v2/checkout endpoints.
root_cause: Stale gateway sockets and network descriptor leaks causing request backpressure.
resolution: Perform rolling restart of api-gateway container service to flush descriptor table and restore latency.

title: Kubernetes Pod CrashLoopBackOff
description: Pod order-service-5c8f7d in namespace production is in CrashLoopBackOff state. Last 5 restarts within 10 minutes. Exit code 137 (OOMKilled).
root_cause: Service pod terminated by Kubernetes kernel OOM killer due to memory spikes during bulk CSV imports.
resolution: Increase container memory allocation limits to 4GB in Helm values configuration and restart deployment.

title: Network Latency Spike Between Data Centers
description: Network latency between DC-East and DC-West has spiked to 250ms (normally 15ms). Packet loss at 3.2%. Affecting cross-DC database replication.
root_cause: Interface degradation on primary inter-DC trunk link causing packet drop retransmissions.
resolution: Failover traffic to secondary optical connection pathway and flag degraded link for hardware replacement.

title: Log Volume Anomaly Detected
description: Error log volume has increased 500% in the last 15 minutes for auth-service. Primarily NullPointerException errors in JWT validation module.
root_cause: Stale auth-service cache and database lookup failures causing validation exceptions.
resolution: Restart auth-service cache pods and flush verification cache to resolve token exceptions.

title: Abnormal End (ABEND) Recovery Runbook
description: The service exited abruptly with exit code 1. Stack trace indicates file lock failure on lockfile.dat.
root_cause: Transient process crash leaving locks active on billing database lockfile.
resolution: Release stale file lock for billing service, clear transient cache, and restart process billing-agent.

title: Splunk Alert: Simulated Splunk Log Alert
description:
Host: splunk-simulated-host
Raw Event: 2026-06-11 08:46:19 ERROR: Host db-server-03 experienced an abend in payment-gateway: NullPointerException
root_cause: Fatal Exception 'NullPointerException' raised in module checkout_gateway.py (line 387) on host 'splunk-simulated-host'.
resolution: Restart auth-service cache pods and flush verification cache to resolve token exceptions.
